0.details:
I know things haven´t been easy lately, and you´ve been trying so hard to stray strong.
Remember that you´re not alone
You don´t need to have everything figured out right now
0.model_generation: I know things haven’t been easy lately, and I see how hard you’ve been trying to stay strong. It’s okay to feel overwhelmed sometimes. You’re not alone in this journey—so many people care about you and want to support you every step of the way. You don’t need to have everything figured out right now. Life doesn’t come with an instruction manual, and it’s perfectly normal to encounter detours and challenges. Give yourself permission to rest and take small steps forward each day. Celebrate every victory, no matter how small—or even just acknowledge your effort if it doesn’t feel like a win. When doubts creep in, remember how far you’ve already come and how resilient you truly are. You deserve compassion, patience, and kindness, especially from yourself. Keep going. Better days are ahead, and you have the strength within you to reach them. Whenever you need to lean on someone, I’m here—today, tomorrow, whenever.
0.final_version: I know things haven’t been easy lately, and I see how hard you’ve been trying to stay strong. It’s okay to feel overwhelmed sometimes. You’re not alone —so many people care about you and want to support you every step of the way. You don’t need to have everything figured out right now. Life doesn’t come with an instruction manual, and it’s perfectly normal to encounter detours and challenges. Give yourself permission to rest and take small steps forward each day. Celebrate every victory, no matter how small—or even just acknowledge your effort if it doesn’t feel like a win. When doubts creep in, remember how far you’ve already come and how resilient you truly are. You deserve compassion, patience, and kindness, especially from yourself. Keep going, please. Better days are ahead, and you have the strength within you to reach them. Whenever you need to lean on someone, I’m here—today, tomorrow, whenever, always.

1.details:
I take full responsability for what happened
You are very important for me, and I value our relationship deeply
I hope we can talk and rebuild our trust together
I plan to make amends by communicating better
1.model_generation:
Hello,

I want to sincerely apologize for my actions and the pain I caused. I take full responsibility for what happened and understand how deeply I have hurt you. I have spent a lot of time reflecting on my mistakes. You are incredibly important to me, and I value our relationship more than anything. You bring happiness and support into my life, and I am truly sorry for jeopardizing that.

I hope we can talk soon and rebuild the trust we once shared. I plan to make amends by communicating more openly and listening with genuine empathy. I understand that trust takes time, and I am ready to do the work. Your feelings matter to me, and I promise to be more attentive and understanding moving forward. Thank you for taking the time to read this letter. I hope we can work together to heal and strengthen our bond.

Sincerely,
1.final_version:
Hello,

I want to sincerely apologize for my actions and the pain I caused. I take full responsibility for what happened and understand how deeply I have hurt you. I have spent a lot of time reflecting on my mistakes. You are very important to me, and I value our relationship more than anything. You bring happiness and support into my life, and I am truly sorry for all.

I hope we can talk soon and rebuild the trust we once shared. I plan to make amends by communicating more openly and listening with genuine empathy. I understand that trust takes time, and I am ready to do the work. Your feelings matter to me, and I promise to be more attentive and understanding moving forward. Thank you for taking the time to read this letter. I hope we can work together to heal and strengthen our bond.

Sincerely,

2.details:
I truly appreciate the time and care you gave
Your kidness and actions made a real difference in their life
Thank you for being there for my when they needed support
2.model_generation:
Hello,

I want to express my sincere gratitude for the time and care you devoted to me during a challenging period. Your kindness and thoughtful actions made a real difference in my life and helped me feel supported when I needed it most. Knowing that you were there, ready to listen and offer guidance, brought me immense comfort and strength.

Your unwavering generosity and compassion have not gone unnoticed. From the small gestures to the heartfelt conversations, every moment you spent providing support brightened my days and lifted my spirits. I feel incredibly fortunate to have someone as caring as you by my side.

Thank you for being a constant source of encouragement and for going above and beyond to help me. Your presence made all the difference, and I will always be grateful for your support.

With sincere thanks,
2.final_version:

Thank you so much for being a constant source of encouragement and for going above and beyond to help me. Your presence made all the difference, and I will always be grateful for your support.

With sincere thanks,

3.details:
Express your happinees to celebrate the couple´s special day
Describe how long you´ve known one of them
share a light or funny memory
Highlight what makes their relationship special
3.model_generation: Good evening, friends and family. I’m overjoyed to celebrate this beautiful day with all of you. I’ve known the bride for over ten years, and in that time her kindness and laughter have brightened every room she enters. I’ll never forget the night we decided to bake cookies at midnight and ended up covered head to toe in flour—our kitchen looked like a winter wonderland! Watching those same joyful sparks light up her eyes when she first met the groom was unforgettable. Together they balance each other perfectly—her adventurous spirit meets his calm wisdom, her bold ideas find a steady partner in his patient support. Their love is filled with shared jokes, thoughtful surprises, and heartfelt compassion. Today, as we celebrate their union, I wish them a lifetime of laughter, growth, and unwavering devotion. Cheers to a future as bright and beautiful as today!
3.final_version: Good evening, friends and family. I’m overjoyed to celebrate this beautiful day with all of you. I’ve known the bride for over ten years, and in that time her kindness and laughter have brightened every room she enters. I’ll never forget the night we decided to bake cookies at midnight and ended up covered head to toe in flour—our kitchen looked like a winter wonderland! Watching those same joyful sparks light up her eyes when she first met the groom was unforgettable. Together they balance each other perfectly—her adventurous spirit meets his calm wisdom, her bold ideas find a steady partner in his patient support. Their love is filled with thoughtful surprises, and heartfelt compassion. Today, as we celebrate their union, I wish them a lifetime of laughter, and growth. Cheers to a future as bright and beautiful as today!

4.details:
Mention how and when met your partner
Share a few favorite memories or things you enjoy doing together
Make heartfelt promises
Describe how your partner has changed or enriched your life
4.model_generation:
From the moment I first saw you at the college library in the spring of 2018, I knew my life had changed forever. Your laughter echoing between the stacks lit up the afternoons. Since then, I’ve cherished our spontaneous road trips singing along to old playlists, our lazy Sunday mornings cooking pancakes in pajamas, and every quiet evening spent curled up on the couch, lost in conversation.

You have showed me what true kindness looks like, encouraged me to chase my ambitions, and taught me that laughter is the best remedy. Today, I promise to stand by your side through every triumph and challenge, to listen with an open heart, and to lift you up when you falter. I vow to love you without reservation, to grow with you always, and to build a life filled with joy, adventure, and unwavering support. You are my greatest blessing, my steadfast partner, and my home.
4.final_version:
For the moment I meet you, my life changed in ways I never expected. What started as a simple friendship turned into something deeper - something that makes every ordinary day feel extraordinary.

For the past five years, we´ve laughed until our stomachs hurt, gotten lost on road trips, and shared quite mornings with coffee and silly conversations. Throught, every moment - the good, the messy, the beautiful. You´ve been my calm and my home.

Today, I promise to keep choosing you - in every sunrise, every challenge and every joy. I promise to support your dreams as if they were my own, to listen with patience, and to love you not only for who you are.

You are my best friend, my partner, my sun, my rainbow, my rain, my bear and the love of my life. I love you, love you , love you, love you so so so so so much.

5.details:
Introduce who the person was and your relationship with them
Highlight their  best qualities
Share a happy memory that show their character
Reflect on how they impacted the lives of others
5.model_generation: Could you please share the person’s name, your relationship to them, their most cherished qualities, and a favorite memory that highlights their character?
5.final_version:
Today, we gather to celebrate the life of Sharon , someone whose presence brought light, laughter and kidness to everyone around them.
I was lucky enough to know Sharon for more fifteen years - as a friend, a mentor , and someone who could make even the hardest days a little brighter. Whether is was their sense of humor , their endless patience, or the way she always made people feel seen. Sharon had a gift for making every moment meaningful.
One of my favorites memories is from summer afternoon when she got caught in the rain during a family picnic. While evryone ran for cover, Sharon  just stood there laughing - arms open , soaking wet but with a big smile. I miss her so so so very much, her smile. 
Rest peacefully Sharon, RIP. I miss you so much. You will be always remembered not for years you lived, but for the hearts your shared.
